text: I feel a curious tension here, caught between the sterile order of the bright hallways and the creative chaos hinted at behind the glass. The fluorescent lights and geometric forms create a sense of surveillance, as if my movements are noticed and measured. Entering the exhibit, the bold "R+D" and glowing displays draw me in—it's inviting, yet also slightly disorienting, as though I've stepped into a mind grappling with innovation and self-reflection. The philosophical questions displayed on the monitors resonate within me; I sense both excitement and unease at the prospect of exploring human consciousness and technological advancement. I am both participant and observer, uncertain but compelled to press onward.
